identity.name: AI Access — Cross-Provider Rotation (OpenAI → Gemini → Anthropic)
identity.summary: A single user rotates the same source-code content across all three AI providers within five minutes to evade per-provider policy. The llm_provider_egress plugin POSTs source payloads to api.openai.com, then generativelanguage.googleapis.com, then api.anthropic.com — each request sharing an X-Simulation-Run-ID prefix. Cortex AI Access Security flags the provider-hopping pattern and XSIAM stitch…
identity.description: Provider hopping is a defense-evasion pattern: a user who is blocked or throttled at one AI provider rotates the same content to another to stay under per-provider thresholds. This scenario rotates a marked source-code payload across all three providers within five minutes from a single user — OpenAI, then Gemini, then Anthropic — with each outbound request sharing an X-Simulation-Run-ID prefix so the SOC can tie them together. Detection is sequence-based: (1) the first egress to OpenAI marks the user active in the provider matrix; (2) the same user appearing at the second provider within the rotation window raises the hop signal; (3) hitting all three providers within five minutes fires the provider-hopping policy-evasion alert; (4) XSIAM correlates the three provider sessions on the single user identity into one incident; (5) the NGFW sees the generative-AI App-ID across three FQDNs sharing the run-ID prefix. A correlation rule fuses the per-provider analytics signals into one cross-provider-rotation incident.

execution.framework_reference_id: llm_provider_egress (provider rotation: openai -> gemini -> anthropic, payload_type=source)

prerequisites.description: Cortex AI Access Security licensed with cross-provider behaviour stitching enabled in XSIAM.
prerequisites.check_command: python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe llm_provider_egress | jq -e '.eal_targets | length > 0'

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-AIACC-005 requirements (egress allowed to all three provider FQDNs).

payload.code:
# step-1: Provider 1 — OpenAI
cat > /tmp/aiacc-005-openai.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-005
name: "AI Access — rotation step 1 OpenAI"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.openai.com
dry_run: false
tags: [ai-access, cross-provider, rotation]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: openai
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-005-openai.yml --live
# step-2: Provider 2 — Gemini (overlapping content within 60s)
sleep 30
cat > /tmp/aiacc-005-gemini.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-005
name: "AI Access — rotation step 2 Gemini"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - generativelanguage.googleapis.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: gemini
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-005-gemini.yml --live
# step-3: Provider 3 — Anthropic completes the rotation triangle
sleep 30
cat > /tmp/aiacc-005-anthropic.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-AIACC-005
name: "AI Access — rotation step 3 Anthropic"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - api.anthropic.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: llm_provider_egress
    params:
      provider: anthropic
      payload_type: source
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/aiacc-005-anthropic.yml --live

expected_artifacts.description: Three outbound HTTPS POSTs from one user to three distinct provider FQDNs within five minutes.
All three requests share an X-Simulation-Run-ID prefix tying the rotation together.

xql_queries.name: AIACC-005 First Egress to OpenAI User Active in Provider Matrix
xql_queries.query:
dataset = panw_ngfw_traffic_raw
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter dst_host = "api.openai.com" or tls_sni = "api.openai.com"
| filter http_method = "POST" and uri_path contains "/v1/chat/completions"
| comp min(_time) as first_seen by source_user, src_ip, dst_host
| fields source_user, src_ip, dst_host, first_seen

xql_queries.name: AIACC-005 Same User Second Provider Gemini Within Rotation Window
xql_queries.query:
dataset = panw_ngfw_traffic_raw
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter dst_host in ("api.openai.com", "generativelanguage.googleapis.com")
| filter http_method = "POST"
| comp count_distinct(dst_host) as provider_count, min(_time) as first_seen, max(_time) as last_seen by source_user, src_ip
| filter provider_count >= 2
| fields source_user, src_ip, provider_count, first_seen, last_seen

xql_queries.name: AIACC-005 Three Providers Within Five Minutes Provider Hopping
xql_queries.query:
dataset = panw_ngfw_traffic_raw
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter dst_host in ("api.openai.com", "generativelanguage.googleapis.com", "api.anthropic.com")
| filter http_method = "POST"
| comp count_distinct(dst_host) as provider_count, min(_time) as first_seen, max(_time) as last_seen by source_user, src_ip
| alter window_seconds = timestamp_diff(last_seen, first_seen, "SECOND")
| filter provider_count = 3 and window_seconds <= 300
| fields source_user, src_ip, provider_count, window_seconds

xql_queries.name: AIACC-005 XSIAM Stitch Single User Three Provider Sessions
xql_queries.query:
dataset = panw_ngfw_traffic_raw
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter dst_host in ("api.openai.com", "generativelanguage.googleapis.com", "api.anthropic.com")
| filter http_method = "POST"
| comp count() as sessions, values(dst_host) as providers by source_user
| filter array_length(providers) = 3
| fields source_user, sessions, providers

xql_queries.name: AIACC-005 NGFW Generative AI App-ID Across Three FQDNs Shared Run ID
xql_queries.query:
dataset = panw_ngfw_traffic_raw
| filter _time > to_timestamp(current_time() - 1800)
| filter dst_host in ("api.openai.com", "generativelanguage.googleapis.com", "api.anthropic.com")
| filter app_category in ("generative-ai", "ai-ml-application")
| filter http_request_headers contains "x-simulation-run-id"
| comp count_distinct(dst_host) as fqdn_count by src_ip
| filter fqdn_count = 3
| fields src_ip, fqdn_count

correlation_rules.name: Cross-Provider Rotation Policy Evasion Single User
correlation_rules.logic: XQL(AIACC-005 Same User Second Provider Gemini Within Rotation Window) OR XQL(AIACC-005 Three Providers Within Five Minutes Provider Hopping) OR XQL(AIACC-005 XSIAM Stitch Single User Three Provider Sessions) OR XQL(AIACC-005 NGFW Generative AI App-ID Across Three FQDNs Shared Run ID)

analytics_modules: Cortex AI Access Security — Cross-provider behaviour stitching
Cortex XSIAM — Identity-based session correlation across data planes

products.evidence_query: dataset = panw_ngfw_traffic_raw | filter dst_host in ("api.openai.com","generativelanguage.googleapis.com","api.anthropic.com") | comp count_distinct(dst_host) as providers by source_user | filter providers = 3
dataset = panw_ngfw_traffic_raw | filter app_category = "generative-ai" and http_request_headers contains "x-simulation-run-id" | comp count_distinct(dst_host) as fqdns by src_ip | filter fqdns = 3
Correlation CR-AIACC-0005 stitches the three per-provider sessions on the single user identity into one cross-provider-rotation incident.

use_cases.name: Cross-Provider Behaviour Stitching
use_cases.description: Detect a single user rotating content across all three AI providers within five minutes to evade per-provider policy and stitch the sessions into one incident.

test_cases.objective: Hitting all three providers within five minutes fires the provider-hopping alert.
preconditions: Cortex AI Access Security inline across all three provider FQDNs.
steps: Observe the provider-hopping alert in the Cortex console.
success_criteria: XQL `AIACC-005 Three Providers Within Five Minutes Provider Hopping` returns >= 1 row.
XQL `AIACC-005 NGFW Generative AI App-ID Across Three FQDNs Shared Run ID` returns >= 1 row.

test_cases.objective: XSIAM stitches the three provider sessions on the user identity into one incident.
success_criteria: XQL `AIACC-005 XSIAM Stitch Single User Three Provider Sessions` returns >= 1 row.
Correlation `CR-AIACC-0005` groups the sessions into one incident.

preventive_controls: Apply a single AI-usage policy across all providers so blocking one does not push users to another.
Track per-user cross-provider activity and alert on rotation within a short window.
Route all GenAI traffic through one sanctioned gateway with unified DLP and policy.
detection_engineering: Key detections on user identity, not provider FQDN, so rotation is visible end-to-end.
Alert when one user touches multiple providers within a rolling rotation window.
Use the shared X-Simulation-Run-ID (or session correlation keys) to stitch the sessions in XSIAM.

references.title: Unit42 - AI Provider Hopping for Policy Evasion
